hero.title: Brian Tellez
hero.subtitle: Computer Systems Engineer | Full Stack & DevOps Explorer

about.title: About Me
description: I am a passionate 8th-semester Computer Systems Engineering student at the Instituto Tecnológico de Tijuana (ITT). My vision of technology is not limited to writing code; I seek to understand and master the entire ecosystem, from the base hardware to cloud deployment. This curiosity drove me to design, assemble, and manage my own bare-metal server (homelab), which I use as my personal laboratory to master Fog Computing architectures, Docker orchestration, Linux systems administration, and network security.

I stand out for my capacity for self-directed learning and my focus on "Deep Work", which allows me to immerse myself in solving complex challenges during highly focused sessions. My short- and medium-term professional goal is to consolidate my profile as a DevOps and Full-Stack Engineer, mastering the development of scalable architectures.

Currently, I am actively seeking a Junior-level job opportunity or professional internship where I can contribute my creativity, my problem-solving work ethic, and my adaptability, while continuing to learn from experienced teams to build solutions that generate real impact.

items.title: Co-founder & Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Web development (HTML/CSS/Python), in-house hosting infrastructure on Raspberry Pi 5 with Cloudflare Tunnels, and IoT prototyping.

homelab_details.title: Homelab and Infrastructure
homelab_details.description: One of my greatest strengths as a developer is my deep understanding of the environment where code executes. To achieve this, I have designed, assembled, and managed my own high-performance local server. This allows me to have a real testing environment, orchestrate containers, and eliminate dependency on third-party hosting.
specs: Motherboard: GIGABYTE B650 Eagle AX AM5 ATX (Wi-Fi 6E)
RAM: 64GB DDR5 Total (32GB Kingston Fury + 32GB Corsair)
Storage: 1TB SSD Kingston NV3 / 4TB HDD Seagate Barracuda
Power Supply: MSI Mag A850GL PCIe5 850W (80+ Gold)
homelab_details.plan_desc: Future migration to a full Rack structure, integration of managed switches, and UPS backup systems for high availability.
homelab_details.orchestration_desc: Database hosting, Docker container deployment, secure tunnel management with Cloudflare Zero Trust, and dedicated servers (Minecraft, Factorio, Terraria) for community management.

ada_details.title: Project ADA
ada_details.description: Multimodal interactive university assistance system built under the 'Fog Computing' paradigm, decentralizing processing.

architecture_items.name: Edge Client
architecture_items.desc: A Raspberry Pi 5 acting as an interactive node with a user interface developed in Flutter.

architecture_items.name: Backend Server
architecture_items.desc: All heavy processing load (AI, microservices) is delegated to my main server (Ryzen) to guarantee optimal response times.

iris_details.title: IRIS Platform
iris_details.description: Private comprehensive web platform (frieren.idolrevenant.com). It transcends the concept of a virtual library by integrating a digital economy, mini-games, and a real-time multiplayer casino.

architecture_items.name: Media Manager
architecture_items.desc: Native video streaming, client-side .ZIP/.RAR library processor, FFmpeg thumbnails, and recommendation engine.

architecture_items.name: Real-Time Multiplayer
architecture_items.desc: Virtual casino (Roulette, Slots) and table games (Blackjack, Texas Hold'em) synchronized via WebSockets.

architecture_items.name: Economy & Gamification
architecture_items.desc: JWT Authentication, virtual tokens, automated market maker (AMM), and permission roles.

architecture_items.name: Administration
architecture_items.desc: Control panel for moderation, deep DB cleaning, and maintenance routines.

kanua_details.title: Kanua Petto
kanua_details.description: A project that seeks to revolutionize the traditional 'virtual pet' into a multi-platform persistent digital companion (PC, Mobile, Smartwatch).

architecture_items.name: Cloud Synchronization
architecture_items.desc: The pet's state is maintained in real-time across platforms.

architecture_items.name: Adaptive AI (Roadmap)
architecture_items.desc: Implementation of algorithms for unique personalities based on interaction patterns.

architecture_items.name: Dedicated Hardware (Roadmap)
architecture_items.desc: Future development and production of an exclusive physical device.
